name: query_rows
description: Read rows from any table in your Supabase database using the PostgREST-powered REST API. Supports equality, range, pattern, and full-text search filters. Can select specific columns, follow foreign key relationships for joins, order results, and paginate with limit/offset or range headers.

parameters.name: table
parameters.description: The name of the database table to query.

parameters.name: select
parameters.description: Comma-separated columns to return. Use '*' for all. Supports nested selects for joins (e.g. 'id,title,user:users(name)').

parameters.name: column.filter
parameters.description: Filter rows using PostgREST operators: eq, neq, gt, gte, lt, lte, like, ilike, in, is. Format: column=operator.value

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: Sort results by column with direction (e.g. 'created_at.desc').

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of rows to return.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of rows to skip for pagination.
